firstTenMasteryEntries.name: [FTT 201–407] Practicum in Advanced Dynamics
firstTenMasteryEntries.requirement: Tinker with turrets by building and upgrading them to discover new upgrades.
firstTenMasteryEntries.lockedText: A basic understanding of field tech turret dynamics is required.

firstTenMasteryEntries.name: A Trip Down Memory Lane
firstTenMasteryEntries.description: Just like old times! But without the hydras...
firstTenMasteryEntries.requirement: Win the memory game hosted by a lonely ghost.

firstTenMasteryEntries.name: Beast of War
firstTenMasteryEntries.requirement: Take the fight to the front lines.

firstTenMasteryEntries.name: Beetle Feed
firstTenMasteryEntries.description: The fastest way to a roller beetle's heart is through its proventriculus. —Gorrik
firstTenMasteryEntries.requirement: Collect  roller beetle foods and feed Petey the perfect meal.

firstTenMasteryEntries.name: Blazing a Trail
firstTenMasteryEntries.requirement: Gather information from locals about the situation in the Crystal Desert.

firstTenMasteryEntries.name: Crystal Oasis Bounty Tour
firstTenMasteryEntries.requirement: Complete a bounty from each bounty board location.

firstTenMasteryEntries.name: Crystal Oasis Insight: Amnoon Bazaar
firstTenMasteryEntries.requirement: Discover this Crystal Desert Mastery Insight in Crystal Oasis.

firstTenMasteryEntries.name: Crystal Oasis Insight: Glint's Legacy
firstTenMasteryEntries.requirement: Discover this Crystal Desert Mastery Insight in Crystal Oasis.

firstTenMasteryEntries.name: Crystal Oasis Insight: Imed's Grotto
firstTenMasteryEntries.requirement: Discover this Crystal Desert Mastery Insight in Crystal Oasis.

firstTenMasteryEntries.name: Crystal Oasis Insight: Old Amnoon
firstTenMasteryEntries.requirement: Discover this Crystal Desert Mastery Insight in Crystal Oasis.
